hero.subtitle: From creating quizzes with AI to grading bubble sheets in seconds. The all-in-one platform for modern education.
hero.dash.creator: AI Creator
hero.gen.question: What is the primary output of photosynthesis?
trusted.title: Trusted by innovative teams
trusted.subtitle: Join 500+ institutions modernizing their evaluation process.
features.subtitle: Our platform combines powerful AI with a delightful interface to make grading the easiest part of your day.
feat.vision.title: Computer Vision Scanning
feat.vision.desc: Advanced OCR and image processing algorithms digitize handwritten essays and bubble sheets with 99.8% accuracy.
feat.realtime.title: Real-Time Evaluation
feat.realtime.desc: Instantaneous processing means grades are ready seconds after submission, providing immediate feedback loops.
feat.analytics.title: Deep Analytics
feat.analytics.desc: Move beyond simple scores. Identify knowledge gaps, track class trends, and visualize performance growth over time.
feat.criteria.title: Standardized Criteria
feat.criteria.desc: Ensure fairness with AI that applies consistent grading rubrics across every single paper, eliminating bias.
feat.scale.title: Global Scalability
feat.scale.desc: Built for scale. Whether for a single classroom or a multinational corporation, our infrastructure adapts to your needs.
feat.workload.title: Workload Reduction
feat.workload.desc: Reclaim hundreds of hours per semester. Let AI handle the grading while you focus on mentorship.
p2d.subtitle: Watch how our computer vision pipeline transforms physical exam papers into structured, analyzable data.
hiw.step1.title: Point & Capture
hiw.step1.desc: Use the mobile app to scan tests. No special scanners required—just your smartphone.
hiw.step2.title: Instant Correction
hiw.step2.desc: Our computer vision identifies filled bubbles instantly. It handles partial erasures and scribbles with 99% accuracy.
hiw.step3.title: Auto-Gradebook
hiw.step3.desc: Scores are automatically synced to your digital gradebook. No manual data entry ever again.
essay.title: Detailed feedback on every sentence.
essay.subtitle: Our AI reads specifically for your rubric. It highlights grammar errors, detects thesis strength, and provides actionable feedback for students automatically.
essay.card.correction.title: Correction
essay.card.correction.desc: Identifies grammar, syntax, and factual errors instantly.
essay.card.praise.title: Praise
essay.card.praise.desc: Highlights strong arguments and good evidence usage.
essay.doc.title: The Impact of the Industrial Revolution
essay.doc.p1: The Industrial Revolution was a period of major industrialization that took place during the late 1700s and early 1800s.
essay.doc.highlight1: It began in Great Britain and quickly spread to the world.
essay.doc.p2: This time period saw the mechanization of agriculture and textile manufacturing and a revolution in power.
essay.doc.p3: However, there were many negative affects.
essay.doc.highlight2: The pollution was very bad and caused issues.
essay.doc.p4: While economic growth was achieved, the social cost was high for the working class living in crowded cities.
essay.sidebar.title: AI Feedback
essay.sidebar.tooltip.title: How it works
essay.sidebar.tooltip.desc: Our Natural Language Processing models are trained on thousands of academic rubrics to detect argumentative structure, factual consistency, and stylistic nuance.
essay.feedback.thesis.desc: Clear opening statement identifying key time periods.
analytics.chart.title: Skill Gap Analysis
analytics.chart.subtitle: Student vs. Class Average
analytics.alert.title: Intervention Needed
analytics.alert.desc: Vocabulary scores are 20% below class average.
analytics.subtitle: Go beyond a simple letter grade. Our analytics engine breaks down performance by specific skills and learning objectives, helping you spot struggling students before they fall behind.
analytics.card1.title: Skill Mastery
analytics.card1.desc: Track proficiency in specific topics like 'Critical Thinking' or 'Algebra'.
analytics.card2.title: Trend Spotting
analytics.card2.desc: Visualize progress over the semester to validate teaching methods.
curr.title: Performance from Area to Topic
curr.subtitle: Drill down into your institution's data. See exactly which specific contents—like the 'Industrial Revolution'—students are mastering and where they need help.
parent.subtitle: Bridge the gap between home and school. Evalua provides a dedicated mobile portal for guardians to view real-time grades, attendance, and teacher feedback without waiting for report cards.
parent.demo.hint: Tap "Send Live Update" to preview a new message inside the parent portal.
parent.notif.grade.title: New Grade Posted
parent.notif.event.title: Upcoming Event
parent.desc.grade: Great performance! The essay showed strong analytical skills. Keep reviewing the citation format.
parent.desc.event: Don't forget to sign the permission slip by Friday. We need volunteers for the booth!

parent.desc.award: Awarded for consistently helping peers during group study sessions.
parent.desc.attendance: Marked present on time. Consistent attendance this month.

dash.title: Data that drives better decisions.
dash.subtitle: For administrators and department heads, get a bird's-eye view of institutional performance. Track progress over time, compare cohorts, and export data for accreditation.
pricing.title: Simple pricing for
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs. No hidden fees, cancel anytime.
pricing.free.title: Free
pricing.free.desc: Perfect for individual teachers trying out AI grading.
pricing.pro.title: Pro
pricing.pro.desc: For power users who need advanced analytics and essay grading.
pricing.ent.title: Enterprise
pricing.ent.desc: For schools and districts requiring SSO and custom integrations.
ent.title: Built for scale, secured for institutions.
ent.subtitle: Custom deployment options, SSO integration, and SLA-backed guarantees for districts and universities.
ent.feat1.title: Bank-Grade Security
ent.feat1.desc: Your student data is encrypted at rest and in transit. We are SOC2 Type II compliant and FERPA certified.
ent.feat2.title: Seamless SSO
ent.feat2.desc: Integrate with your existing identity provider. We support SAML, OAuth, and OIDC out of the box.
ent.feat3.title: Private Infrastructure
ent.feat3.desc: Option for dedicated VPC deployment or on-premise containerization for maximum data sovereignty.
ent.integrations: Works with the tools you already use
cta.title: Ready to modernize your evaluation process?
cta.subtitle: Join over 500 educational institutions saving time with Evalua AI.
auth.title: Enter the teacher area and continue to your classes dashboard.
auth.subtitle: Access your workspace to manage classes, review activities, and keep your teaching routine organized in one place.
auth.point.security: Protected-looking login with the same brand tone as the landing page.
auth.point.mock: Use your institutional access to sign in quickly and securely.
auth.point.flow: After signing in, you move straight into the teacher classes workspace.

auth.preview.taskMeta: Open activities and corrections requiring attention

classes.title: Manage your classes, create new groups, and monitor what needs action.
classes.subtitle: Track active classes, organize activities, and keep your teaching workflow centralized in a single workspace.
classes.overviewSubtitle: Track the next teaching focus, assignment rhythm, and the key indicators for the class currently in view.
classes.quickPoint.one: Create a new class with the yellow action button and see it appear instantly in the list.
classes.quickPoint.two: Use the search field to filter groups by name, subject, schedule, or current highlight.
classes.quickPoint.three: Key information stays organized in cards for faster reading and day-to-day decision-making.
